headline: Arta expands Arta AI to empower financial advisors and wealth managers with an AI Sidekick
summary: Arta Finance announced the expansion of Arta AI, positioning it as an AI Sidekick designed to empower financial advisors and wealth managers. The company also disclosed it has onboarded new institutional customers as part of this expansion. The announcement signals Arta's strategic push to extend its AI capabilities beyond individual investors toward serving the broader wealth management and financial advisory market.
